title: FluxBucks v4.7.4
message:
What's new:

• ⚡ Quick Replay — restart any game with same bet in one tap
• 💀 Gore Skull toggle — new setting for Russian Roulette
• 📉 Loss toast — slide-in notification when you lose chips
• 🎲 Dice live win rate — see your observed win% vs expected
• 🎨 Color Guess — Coin Flip reworked into a spinning wheel
• 🐔 Chicken Race — slower paced with placements
• ⬆️ Auto-Dismiss Level Up toggle in Settings
• 🎯 Daily challenges now detect all game wins
